block_00: How to make more profit in less time?
block_01: According to statistics, 93% of successful trades are closed using charting tools and indicators. IQ Option offers a variety of such instruments, but the Simple Moving Average (SMA) remains a universal one.
block_02: Example of successful trend trading using indicators
block_03: Most Profitable Trade of the Week
block_10: SMA can be applied to the chart on any asset and timeframe. It can be used as a multi-indicator in the GoldenCross trading strategy.
block_13: SMA indicator is applied to the chart twice with different period settings. The standard periods are 50 (fast) and 200 (slow), but you can choose 5 and 15 for short trades.
block_15: If the fast SMA crosses the slow one going upwards and both of them rise, the asset price is likely to rise as well.
block_16: Time to check the investment settings. If everything is correct, you can make an Up trade.
block_17: This strategy can be combined with other indicators to get more analytical information before you make a decision.
